prediction.reasoning: JNJ is a large-cap healthcare stock with relatively low volatility (historical volatility ~15-20% annually). Over 20 days, I estimate modest upward drift of ~0.64% based on typical healthcare sector performance and JNJ's stable fundamentals. Daily volatility of approximately 1.2% translates to 20-day standard deviation of ~5.4%. Point estimate reflects slight positive trend, with confidence intervals accounting for normal distribution of returns and increasing width for higher confidence levels.
